title: Per-(Session, Assertion) Fact Grain
description: Schema for the per-(session, assertion) instrumentation fact. Carries shape (task character classification) and confidence (planner certainty). The top-level x-shape-vocab array is the load-bearing SSOT for the controlled shape vocabulary — gates and downstream consumers source it via jq rather than re-parsing the nested enum, mirroring the x-disallowed-fields convention in manifest-schema.json.

session_id.description: Pipeline session identifier (YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS-xxxx), scoping this fact to a single pipeline run.

assertion_id.description: Validation-contract assertion identifier (e.g., M1.area.slug), scoping this fact to a single verifiable claim.

shape.description: Task character classification. Use misc when none of the specific values apply.

confidence.description: Planner certainty that the task will meet its success criteria: high (well-understood scope), medium (some uncertainty), stretch (novel or poorly-bounded work).

task_id.description: Optional task identifier (e.g., M1.T01.slug) for joining against calibration.jsonl.
